calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Transfer To Placer County
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Guggenhime for the Bank Of New York Trust Company (Trustee).

Mr. Guggenhime stated that there was good cause to ask the Court for jurisdiction, not supervision and presented oral argument to support his position. The Court allowed the first account and report. The Court stated that the Conservatorship currently in Sacramneto was going to be transferred to Placer county as the Conservatee was to be relocated there. The Court ordered the trust be transferred to Placer County prior to December 15, 2008 and set the matter for status on the same.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris and M. Anderson.
